title: Swords Of Ultima
description: Adds some swords to the game, which are expensive but get quite strong.
body:
This mods adds a few swords.

The Broken Sword of Ultima is the weakest, but like the rest cannot break. It can be found in an underground structure.
The Sword of Ultima is stronger than a netherite sword.
The Swift, and Strong Sword(s) of Ultima are self explanitory.
The Flaming Sword of Ultima shoots fireballs on right click.
The Eternal Sword shoots wither skulls and has the abilities of the prevoious three.
